policy.release_blocker_authority: Kernel Sentinel verdict only after current evidence

repair_lanes.root_cause_hypothesis: Release-fail verdicts remain hard to repair when release evidence and receipt-integrity bridge failures do not identify the missing artifact, stale source, receipt mismatch, owner, replay command, and blocker class.
repair_lanes.concrete_next_action: Require every release-evidence or receipt-integrity Sentinel blocker to carry current evidence, exact bridge name, owner guess, replay command, blocker class, and artifact refs before promotion.
acceptance_criteria: Release-evidence blockers identify the missing or stale artifact and cite a current-live-truth or recent-but-not-current freshness tier.
Receipt-integrity blockers name the failed receipt surface, expected invariant, observed mismatch, and replay command.
Sentinel final reports group release-evidence and receipt-integrity failures separately from optimization suggestions.
A release-fail verdict cannot promote a bridge issue candidate without owner guess, blocker class, evidence refs, and concrete next action.
